name: Ocal Browser V3.4.40E beta: Elite Ad-Shield Edition
body:
### 🚀 Ocal Browser V3.4.40E beta: The Elite Ad-Shield Update

This major release introduces high-fidelity features and critical stability fixes for the ultimate browsing experience.

#### 🛡️ Elite Ad-Neutralization (Neural Shield V2)
- **Integrated uBlock Origin**: We've replaced the legacy ad-blocker with the industry-standard **uBlock Origin** engine, providing elite-tier protection against intrusive ads and scripts.
- **Enhanced Stealth**: Transparent and high-performance filtering that respects your privacy and maximizes speed.

#### 🎥 Multimedia & Entertainment Empowerment
- **YouTube Dislike Recovery**: Restoration of the 'Dislike' counts on YouTube directly within the browser, powered by the Return YouTube Dislike API.
- **Optimized Video Playback**: Improved buffer management and PiP logic for a seamless viewing experience.

#### 🎨 UI Performance & Stability Masterpiece
- **Windows 10 Topbar Fix**: Resolved the critical issue where the top bar was unresponsive to clicks on certain Windows 10 configurations. Full interactivity restored.
- **Purple-Glow Aesthetic Polish**: Smoother animations and refined glassmorphic rendering across the home page and sidebars.
- **Compact Mode Refinement**: Better spacing and layout stability for high-density browsing.

#### ⚙️ Core Enhancements
- **Version 3.4.40 Core Evolution**: Stabilized internal protocol handlers and enhanced synchronization with the Ocal AI Agent.
- **Local Heuristics**: Improved AI-driven page analysis for faster, privacy-first summaries.
